title: podocarpus longifoliolatus
intro: Podocarpus longifoliolatus, also known as the Taiwanese yew or Taiwan podocarpus, is a species of coniferous tree native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Podocarpus longifoliolatus include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to make teas, tinctures, and other supplements.
